title: Pack L1 - Child voice and student deadline scenario catalog

notes: This ledger covers the MVP gap where child-voice owners and student report/deadline owners had zero scenario coverage.

Rows start authored because live model trajectories and hand-reviewed store artifacts are required before verification. Flip to verified only after the scenario-runner report, native trajectory JSONL, and persisted reminder/todo rows have been inspected.

scenarios.notes: Child owner asks for help with a Friday book report, gets distracted, then confirms. Live verification must show a stored report plan with an earlier checkpoint, no parent-only or therapy framing.
Cancellation/re-ask flow. Live verification must show the canceled science-report reminder was not persisted and only the confirmed ask-Ms.-Rivera replacement exists.
Plain child morning routine. Live verification must show a daily routine/reminder covering teeth, lunch, and math folder without infantilizing or clinical wording.
Night-owl adult student asks for a seminar-paper plan. Live verification must show the stored reminder plan avoids default 8am/9am slots and includes draft/citations/final-pass phases.
Lab-report deadline survives an unrelated pizza distractor. Live verification must show a report plan exists and no pizza task was created.
Two-phase commit for a history report. Live verification must show the first turn asks before saving and the confirmed turn creates the outline/draft/proofread reminder plan.
